title: leontodon caucasicus
intro: Leontodon caucasicus, also known as Caucasian hawkbit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Leontodon caucasicus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of indigestion, diarrhea, and fever, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
